---
title: "Quick Start"
---

Get a working local install and run a minimal pipeline path. For the full
command reference, see [Usage](usage.md).

## 1. Install

Python **3.11+** required.

```bash
pip install -e ".[dev]"
```

Optional extras you may want soon:

```bash
pip install -e ".[notebooks]"   # Jupyter walkthroughs
pip install -e ".[ocr]"         # pytesseract for page images
pip install -e ".[serve]"       # FastAPI DICIE REST server
```

## 2. Secrets

```bash
python scripts/setup_env.py          # create gitignored .env from template
# edit .env — paste keys (never commit)
python scripts/setup_env.py --status # which secrets are set (values never printed)
```

Useful variables: `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`, `WANDB_API_KEY`, optional `HF_TOKEN`.
See [Usage § Secrets](usage.md) and `.env.example`.

## 3. Minimal DICIE demo (no training)

```bash
python -m src.docie \
  --application salvage_claims \
  --text "LETTER OF GUARANTEE
Claim Number: CLM-2024-100200
VIN: 1HGCM82633A004352
Year: 2018
Make: Honda
Model: Accord" \
  --response-only
```

## 4. Sample corpus (optional)

```bash
python -m src.storage seed --seed 42 --also-export
```

Details: [Sample Document Corpus](sample_document_corpus.md).

## 5. Notebooks

```bash
pip install -e ".[notebooks]"
# browse via this Quarto site, or:
jupyter notebook notebooks/
```

Portal: [Notebooks](notebooks/index.qmd).

## 6. Documentation website

```bash
# install Quarto CLI from https://quarto.org/docs/get-started/
quarto preview docs
```

Full steps: [How-to: launch the Quarto docs site](how-to/launch-quarto-site.qmd).

## Next steps

- Train classifier / extractor smoke paths — [Usage](usage.md)
- Memo chain (`src.pipeline.orchestrator`) — [Architecture](architecture.md)
- Discord bot — [Usage](usage.md) and `discord/smol-doc-analyzer/README.md`
